creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
naddy@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Synopsis: [patch] archivers/xz: define x86_64 on amd64
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: naddy
> State-Changed-When: Thu Oct 1 21:50:06 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Solved differently (CONFIGURE_TARGET).  Thanks for your report.

I disagree. Please, fix this at the autoconf level, too.

BTW, this one and byteswapping fix (ports/139206) should be sent
upstream. These bugs are not peculiar to FreeBSD but may affect other
platforms even non-BSD ones.

>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=139205
